name: agentbrowse
description: Give your coding agent the web as a command line — install agentbrowse so it drives any website by default.

plugins.name: agentbrowse
plugins.description: Drive any website from the terminal: navigate, read, click, fill forms, reuse logins, and capture/replay the JSON APIs a page fetches. Installs a skill so the agent uses `npx agentbrowse` by default for web tasks.
